summary_insights.display_text: Gourmet Capital (600096): 9 Restaurants + 8 Cafes. Top target for 'Flash Pay' & Merchant 'Bharat QR'.
Cafe Culture Hub (600091): 15 Cafes + 2 Restaurants. Ideal for youth-centric 'Yuvamitra' & 'FedMobile'.
Social Dining Pocket (600100): 10 Cafes + 3 Restaurants. Focus on 'Credit Card' dining perks.

expanded_view_details.title: Mainstream Dining & Tech Hub
expanded_view_details.insight: Perungudi shows a high density of both full-service restaurants and cafes, making it the highest spending zone for contactless tech like 'Flash Pay'.
expanded_view_details.action: Deploy Bharat QR at all merchant points and offer 'Flash Pay' smart keychains to frequent diners.
expanded_view_details.edge: Highest restaurant count in the dataset, attracting IT corridor spenders.

expanded_view_details.title: Youth-Centric Cafe Corridor
expanded_view_details.insight: Madipakkam has the highest number of cafes, indicating a huge youth/student population. Perfect for 'Yuvamitra' digital onboarding.
expanded_view_details.action: Partner with top 5 cafes for 'FedMobile' discount campaigns and UPI lite awareness.
expanded_view_details.edge: Unmatched cafe density creates high-frequency micro-transaction volume.
expanded_view_details.risk_mitigation: KYC compliance for young adults via Video KYC.

expanded_view_details.title: Social & Residential Dining Hub
expanded_view_details.insight: Medavakkam's high cafe count combined with 4 townships creates a unique opportunity for family-oriented credit card spending.
expanded_view_details.action: Promote 'Mahilamitra Plus' for dining benefits and family lifestyle rewards.
expanded_view_details.edge: Strong synergy with nearby residential townships.

expanded_view_details.title: Premium Coastal Social Scene
expanded_view_details.insight: Tiruvanmiyur's urban crowd prefers niche cafes. High opportunity for international debit card usage and digital forex services.
expanded_view_details.action: Market Mastercard Crown debit cards for premium lifestyle and global acceptance.
expanded_view_details.edge: Affluent urban demographic with global travel/spending patterns.

expanded_view_details.title: Emerging Quick-Service Pocket
expanded_view_details.insight: Nanganallur is more traditional, but the presence of cafes shows a shift in millennial habits. Focus on small merchant UPI.
expanded_view_details.action: Onboard local cafe owners to 'Fed E Biz' for simplified business banking.
expanded_view_details.edge: Stable community with growing digital adoption.

expanded_view_details.title: Urban Transit Dining Edge
expanded_view_details.insight: Oggiamthoraipakkam serves as a transit/work hub; cafes here are used by commuters and young professionals.
expanded_view_details.action: Introduce 'e-RUPI' vouchers for corporate meal programs in nearby IT buildings.

expanded_view_details.title: Suburban Leisure Spot
expanded_view_details.insight: Old Pallavaram shows minimal organized social dining infrastructure in this segment.
expanded_view_details.action: Provide basic UPI/QR support for standalone eateries.

expanded_view_details.title: Residential Core (Leisure Gap)
expanded_view_details.insight: This Velachery segment lacks cafes despite high population, indicating residents travel out for leisure.
expanded_view_details.action: Track new food-court approvals in upcoming commercial projects.

expanded_view_details.title: Industrial-Residential Fringe
expanded_view_details.insight: Kovilambakkam segment lacks social infrastructure; focus should remain on core savings.
expanded_view_details.action: Monitor for future retail outlet approvals.

expanded_view_details.title: Peripheral Zone
expanded_view_details.insight: Adambakkam slice shows zero dining POIs in this boundary.
expanded_view_details.action: Minimal focus required for this specific vertical.
